summary: C10: src/lib/boot.ts — verify corpus schema version + embedding dim on first DB touch, fail fast on mismatch (wired into DB module not layout)

resolution.note: src/lib/boot.ts written. Fail-fast env presence checks (REQUIRED throws, RECOMMENDED warns) + Ollama reachability check + embedding-dim assertion (768 for nomic-embed-text:v1.5). Wired via src/instrumentation.ts → register() so checks run at server start, not build time. Type-check clean, 62 tests passing.
